requirements.label: EMGS Visa Approval Letter (VAL)
requirements.detail: Your institution applies for a Visa Approval Letter through EMGS before you enter Malaysia.

requirements.label: Offer letter from an approved institution
requirements.detail: An offer of a place from an institution approved to enrol international students.

requirements.label: Proof of funds
requirements.detail: No single fixed figure — show enough to cover tuition plus living costs (commonly RM 1,500–2,500/month). Provide consistent, genuine bank statements.

requirements.label: Medical insurance / EMGS coverage
requirements.detail: Medical insurance arranged via EMGS for international students.

requirements.label: Medical examination
requirements.detail: A pre-arrival and post-arrival medical screening is required.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for at least 12 months.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Malaysian number and data on landing.

requirements.label: Accommodation
requirements.detail: Arrange housing or a hostel early.
